stem: She was so afraid of the dentist that her husband ___ go with her.
explanation: 考点:have (got) to。客观情势迫使「不得不」陪同，用 had to。must 偏主观义务，与「被迫」语境不符。

stem: She remembered ___ her wallet on the garden seat.
explanation: 考点:remember doing。想起已经做过的事（把钱包落下了），用 remember + 动名词 leaving。

stem: Don't forget ___ the dentist when you leave the house.
explanation: 考点:forget to do。提醒「别忘了去做」（还没做），用 forget + 不定式 to call。

stem: You ___ wait in the garden if you don't want to; you can come inside.
explanation: 考点:have to 否定。表示「不必」，用 don't have to。mustn't 表「禁止」，含义不同。

stem: I remembered ___ (lock) the door, but I forgot where I put the key.
explanation: 考点:remember to do 与 forget 的区别。remember to lock 指「记得要去锁门」；后文 forget where 是另一件事。

stem: Hurstwood ___ control a large territory, but he has retired.
explanation: 考点:used to do。过去曾控制着地盘、现已不再，用 used to control。

stem: He is used to ___ in luxury despite his rough appearance.
explanation: 考点:be used to doing。be used to 后接动名词，表示「习惯于」过奢侈生活。

stem: He didn't ___ wear such cheap clothes when he was younger.
explanation: 考点:used to 否定。didn't use to 是 used to 的否定形式，use 不加 d。

stem: She has got used to ___ alone since her husband retired.
explanation: 考点:be used to doing。has got used to 后接动名词 being，表逐渐习惯。

stem: There used ___ (be) a gang headquarters on this street years ago.
explanation: 考点:used to be。过去曾有（现已不在），用 used to be。

stem: The gap was not wide ___ for his hand to reach through.
explanation: 考点:enough...to。形容词 + enough + to do：缝隙不够宽，手伸不过去。

stem: The boy was ___ stubborn ___ he would not leave the shop.
explanation: 考点:so...that。so + 形容词 stubborn + that 从句，表「如此固执以至于……」。

stem: It was ___ a narrow gap ___ the policeman had to pry it open.
explanation: 考点:such...that。such + a + 形容词 + 名词 + that，修饰名词 gap。

stem: He was foolish ___ to argue with the police over fifty pence.
explanation: 考点:enough...to。foolish enough to do 表「蠢到去做……」。

stem: The boy lay on the floor for so long that the assistant ___ (grow) impatient.
explanation: 考点:so...that 结果。so long that 引出结果，主句用一般过去时 grew。

stem: The lamb was accustomed to ___ Mary everywhere on the farm.
explanation: 考点:be accustomed to doing。be accustomed to 后接动名词 following。

stem: Mary ___ look after the lamb during school breaks.
explanation: 考点:have to。校长允许羔羊留下，但 Mary 客观上「不得不」在课间照料它，用 had to。

stem: The teacher was ___ to take the lamb out of the classroom.
explanation: 考点:be obliged to do。be obliged to = have to，表示被迫、不得不。

stem: She is accustomed to ___ up early on the farm.
explanation: 考点:be accustomed to doing。to 是介词，后接动名词 getting。

stem: The headmaster permitted the lamb to stay, but Mary ___ (have) to tend it every day.
explanation: 考点:have to 过去式。叙述过去义务用 had to，后接动词原形 tend。

lessonTitle: The longest suspension bridge in the world
stem: The bridge ___ traffic since 1964.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时 + since。since 1964 表示从过去持续到现在，用 has carried。

lessonTitle: The longest suspension bridge in the world
stem: Engineers have studied wind effects on the span ___ decades.
explanation: 考点:for + 时间段。for decades 与现在完成时连用，表持续数十年。

lessonTitle: The longest suspension bridge in the world
stem: The main span is 4,260 feet ___.
explanation: 考点:尺寸表达。... feet long 表长度，用形容词 long，不用名词 length。

lessonTitle: The longest suspension bridge in the world
stem: Each cable consists of ___ of thousands of steel wires.
explanation: 考点:数量表达。tens of thousands of 是固定搭配，表示「数以万计的」。

lessonTitle: The longest suspension bridge in the world
stem: The bridge ___ (be) a symbol of the city since it was completed.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时 + since。since it was completed 从过去持续至今，用 has been。

stem: The damaged sculptures ___ a private collector.
explanation: 考点:belong to。主语是物（雕塑），「属于」某人用 belong to；belong 是不及物动词。

stem: The gallery ___ several valuable works of modern art.
explanation: 考点:possess。主语是物主（画廊），「拥有」作品用 possesses；possess 一般不用被动。

stem: The exhibition ___ of wire sculptures and electric lights.
explanation: 考点:consist of。表示「由……组成」用 consist of，不用被动。

stem: Risk ___ to every new form of artistic expression.
explanation: 考点:belong to 抽象用法。risk belongs to... 表示「风险属于……」，主语是 risk。

stem: These pieces ___ (belong) to the gallery itself, not to any lender.
explanation: 考点:belong to。一般现在时，主语 pieces 复数，belong to 表所属。

stem: The cat ___ before she noticed anything was wrong.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。消失发生在「注意到」之前，即过去的过去，用 had disappeared。

stem: You ___ not tell the police, the anonymous voice warned.
explanation: 考点:had better (not) do。警告「最好不要」用 had better not tell。

stem: The thieves ___ the house before taking the cat.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。洗劫发生在带走猫之前，用 had ransacked。

stem: She ___ put an address on the cat's collar in future.
explanation: 考点:had better。对将来的建议「最好做某事」用 had better put。

stem: By the time she called the police, the thieves ___ (leave) with the cat.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。by the time + 过去时，主句动作先于从句发生，用 had left。

stem: In 1906 he ___ make the first recorded powered flight in Europe.
explanation: 考点:was able to。叙述过去某次具体成功，用 was able to make。

stem: He ___ design and build his own aircraft when he was young.
explanation: 考点:could 表过去能力。过去一般性能力「能设计制造」，用 could design。

stem: After many failed attempts, he ___ land the machine safely.
explanation: 考点:was able to。多次失败后「终于成功着陆」，强调结果，用 was able to land。

stem: Few pilots ___ control such light aircraft in a strong wind.
explanation: 考点:could 表过去能力。过去一般性能力「能在强风中操控」，用 could control。

stem: Santos-Dumont ___ (be able to) fly around the Eiffel Tower in his airship.
explanation: 考点:was able to。过去某次具体成功飞行，用 was able to fly。

stem: Mendoza ___ in London in 1764.
explanation: 考点:被动语态。出生用 be born，过去时间用 was born。

stem: He ___ by both the rich and the poor during his career.
explanation: 考点:被动语态。他被仰慕，主语是承受者，用 was admired。

stem: He ___ more than once for debt.
explanation: 考点:被动语态。他被关押，用 was imprisoned。

stem: His name ___ by boxing fans ever since.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时被动。ever since 与现在完成时被动 has been remembered 连用。

stem: He ___ (defeat) by a stronger opponent later in his career.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动。他被击败，用 was defeated。

stem: He was unaware ___ the mistake in the order of the scenes.
explanation: 考点:be unaware of。固定搭配 unaware of + 名词，不接 about。

stem: Can you tell the difference ___ learning by heart and truly understanding?
explanation: 考点:tell the difference between A and B。两者之间用 between...and...。

stem: She was unaware that the audience ___ already noticed.
explanation: 考点:be unaware that + 从句。注意到发生在过去某时之前，用 had already noticed。

stem: It is hard to tell one version ___ the other.
explanation: 考点:tell A from B。区分两者也可用 tell one version from the other。

stem: The actor learned his lines by heart but was unaware that he ___ (mix) up two scenes.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时 + unaware。弄混发生在意识到之前，用 had mixed。

lessonTitle: One man's meat is another man's poison
stem: ___ how popular the show was, viewers eventually tired of it.
explanation: 考点:no matter how。no matter how + 形容词，表「无论多么……」。

lessonTitle: One man's meat is another man's poison
stem: No matter ___ they tried, they could not please everyone.
explanation: 考点:no matter what。no matter what they tried = whatever they tried。

lessonTitle: One man's meat is another man's poison
stem: ___ strange the stories were, audiences kept watching.
explanation: 考点:no matter how + 形容词。no matter how strange = however strange。

lessonTitle: One man's meat is another man's poison
stem: Similar programmes flooded the screens, ___ the original show was still on.
explanation: 考点:although 让步。although 引导让步从句；but 不能与 although 同句。

lessonTitle: One man's meat is another man's poison
stem: No matter ___ (many) copies appeared, the public soon lost interest.
explanation: 考点:no matter how many。no matter how many copies = however many copies。

stem: He ___ have called the fire brigade; his wife had a spare key.
explanation: 考点:needn't have done。本不必叫消防队却叫了，暗含后悔，用 needn't have called。

stem: She ___ to wait outside; she could have used her spare key.
explanation: 考点:didn't need to。单纯说明「不必等」，用 didn't need to wait。

stem: You ___ have paid for the service; I could have climbed in myself.
explanation: 考点:needn't have done。本不必付钱却付了，用 needn't have paid。

stem: He ___ to go to the pub to phone; he had a mobile in his pocket.
explanation: 考点:didn't need to。不必去酒吧打电话，只陈述没有必要，用 didn't need to go。

stem: He needn't ___ (worry); his wife would have been home within an hour.
explanation: 考点:needn't have done。needn't have + 过去分词，本不必担心却担心了。
